note: Evidence Upgrade overlay: grounds 7 of the 16 pilot cases in REAL, verifiable public STANDARD designations (ASTM/ISO/EN) that document exactly these failure/measurement modes. Deliberately NOT fabricated primary-literature citations (no invented DOIs/authors). The chemistry is UNCHANGED — only provenance and evidenceQuality are added. Exact standard editions are marked for human-in-the-loop confirmation at ingestion; the standard DESIGNATIONS themselves are stable public identifiers. This tests whether the engine's yields survive illustrative -> grounded.
